overview.description: This is a list of Monuments of National Importance (ASI) as officially recognized by and available through the website of the Archaeological Survey of India in the Indian state Gujarat. The monument identifier is a combination of the abbreviation of the subdivision of the list (state, ASI circle) and the numbering as published on the website of the ASI. 203 Monuments of National Importance have been recognized by the ASI in Gujarat.

topPlaces.name: Thangadh
topPlaces.description: Thangadh (Than) is an industrial city of Surendranagar district in the state of Gujarat, India. The municipality is functioning in Than.

topPlaces.name: Trinetreshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Trineteshwar temple (Devanagari: त्रिनेतेश्वर महादेव मंदिर) is a Shiva temple of Pratihara style, located in the Tarnetar village of Surendranagar district, Gujarat. It was built by Mihira Bhoja in the eighth century.

topPlaces.name: Tarnetar
topPlaces.description: Tarnetar is a village in the Surendranagar district of the state of Gujarat in India. It is situated near the city of Thangadh.

items.note: Thangadh (Than) is an industrial city of Surendranagar district in the state of Gujarat, India. The municipality is functioning in Than.

Trineteshwar temple (Devanagari: त्रिनेतेश्वर महादेव मंदिर) is a Shiva temple of Pratihara style, located in the Tarnetar village of Surendranagar district, Gujarat. It was built by Mihira Bhoja in the eighth century.
Tarnetar is a village in the Surendranagar district of the state of Gujarat in India. It is situated near the city of Thangadh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sun temple, Thangadh?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sun temple, Thangadh is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sun temple, Thangadh?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajkot Airport (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (56 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sun temple, Thangadh?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sun temple, Thangadh at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sun temple, Thangadh?
faq.a: Stays in Sun temple, Thangadh start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sun temple, Thangadh?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thangadh, Trinetreshwar Temple, Tarnetar.
